scripts.build: npm run build:ts && node-gyp configure build
scripts.build:wasm: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist/wasm',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run build:wasm:ts && emcmake cmake -S . -B build/wasm -DBUILD_WASM=ON -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF && cmake --build build/wasm
scripts.build:wasm:ts: tsc -p wasm/tsconfig.json && tsc --declaration --module es2022 --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --lib es2022,dom,esnext.disposable --strict --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir dist/wasm src/native-binding.ts src/node-wrapper.ts && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/wasm',{recursive:true});require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/wasm/package.json',JSON.stringify({type:'module'},null,2)+'\n')"
scripts.test:wasm: npm run build:wasm && node tests/wasm/esm-import.test.mjs && node tests/wasm/direct.test.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run build:ts && npm run build:wasm
